is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria; genotyping of pfk13 and pfmdr1.

reports_target_markers.evidence: pfmdr1 N86 analysed and reported: 'pfmdr1 (codon positions: 86, 184 and 1246)'. Pfmdr1 codon 86 is a curated marker.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 4: pfmdr1 N86 328/328 (100%) at D0, 43/43 (100%) at R0; also 184F 108/328 (32.9%) and D1246. pfk13 SNP frequencies given per site in Table 5.

sub_country_location.evidence: Table 5 breaks down pfk13 SNPs by site (Ipinda, Nagaga, Karume, Simbo); sites are named towns within regions (Karume-Mwanza, Ipinda-Mbeya, Simbo-Tabora, Nagaga-Mtwara). However, pfmdr1 codon 86 frequencies in Table 4 are pooled across all four sites, not site-level.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Samples collected between May and September 2019, a single well-defined window well under 3 years.

african_field_samples.evidence: Human clinical isolates from children with uncomplicated malaria in mainland Tanzania (Mwanza, Mbeya, Tabora, Mtwara regions).

is_primary_study.evidence: Single-arm prospective antimalarial drug efficacy trial with primary field data collection.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Conducted at four of eight NMCP sentinel sites, part of ongoing NMCP surveillance network since 1997; 'similar to our previous findings [5, 19, 23, 28, 29] in the same surveillance areas' — routine surveillance framework raises some overlap possibility but this is a distinct 2019 collection.

supplement.evidence: Supplementary files (Table S1 genotyping calls, Table S2 2/3 cure rates) exist but the drug-resistance marker frequencies needed for extraction are in the main text (Tables 4 and 5).

assessment.summary: Prospective AL efficacy trial in children at four Tanzanian NMCP sentinel sites (Karume-Mwanza, Ipinda-Mbeya, Simbo-Tabora, Nagaga-Mtwara), May–Sept 2019. Reports pfmdr1 N86 (100% wild type, extractable counts) and pfk13 mutations with site-level breakdown. pfk13 codon 469 among detected mutations is a curated position; pfmdr1 86 is a curated marker with frequencies. Temporal window is a single 2019 season. pfk13 frequencies given per site; pfmdr1 given pooled but all data traceable to the four named sites.
